sourceMovie.title: The Good Heart
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Good Heart works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

seoTitle: Movies Like The Good Heart (Underrated Drama Films With Real Emotion)
seoDescription: If you liked The Good Heart, these emotional dramas deliver the same raw characters, quiet tension, and unexpected warmth.

recommendations.title: Before We Go
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Good Heart clicked for you, Before We Go (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Good Heart?
faq.answer: Try Before We Go, Great Expectations, Just Like Heaven—each shares DNA with The Good Heart while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Good Heart?
faq.answer: The Good Heart (2009) is best described as Drama, Comedy, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Good Heart worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
